name: Tuta

pricing.details: Free tier: 1GB storage, 1 address. Revolutionary plan €3/month with custom domains.

description: End-to-end encrypted email and calendar service based in Germany. Encrypts subject lines in addition to message body, unlike most E2E email providers.
rationale: Tuta differentiates itself by encrypting email subject lines and calendar event data, not only message bodies. The proprietary encryption protocol has been updated to incorporate post-quantum algorithms. Applications are fully open source. German jurisdiction (GDPR) provides clear data handling obligations. No PGP support, so E2E encryption is limited to communication between Tuta users.
